task: Current Vilboz bring-up has successful ASIC_Init, eDP panel power, EDID, 1366x768 timing, DP 1-lane HBR training, CRTC enabled, backlight on, but black screen because no DCN1 framebuffer scanout. Analyze local Linux 6.12 DCN1 code and recommend the shortest credible next implementation step in coreboot. Decide whether to implement minimal HUBP/DPP/MPC scanout now or first add a GOP/native comparative register dump. Include exact critical registers and risks. Do not edit.
